description:
Turn your voice into polished text.

Ultra-fast AI powered dictation that understands what you want to say and how you want to say it. Instantly turn speech into perfect emails, crisp notes, clear messages, professional communication, and more.
Features and Fixes
- Toggle for "Automatically increase microphone volume" for improved voice detection
- Toggle for "Silence removal" to improve accuracy and reduce hallucinations
- Add mouse button shortcut for recording toggle and push-to-talk
- Add clipboard behavior preference to allow clipboard bypass and restoration
- "Identify Speakers" feature for Whisper, Parakeet Multi-language and most cloud models, including speaker naming UI
- SV-1 and SL-1 are now model defaults
- Context-menu on Settings -> Modes items right-click with duplicate, delete and set active
- History full-window view for long transcriptions
- Progress indicator for file decoding and transcription progress (applies to Whisper and Parakeet models)
- Elevenlabs Scribe V2 model with real-time support (currently available as an experimental model)
- Complete overhaul of onboarding flow with microphone check and default model selection
- License UI overhaul with improved deeplink handling
